system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

tool_returns.detail:
Independent reviewers noted that Xenmore catalogue archives from 2000 were consistent with storage entries logged in the summer oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
Independent reviewers noted that Vyport dispatch archives from 1993 were consistent with ledger entries logged in the summer oversight bulletin under the preliminary review framework.
The 1987 autumn compilation of Westcairn summary records included 942.5 storage cross-references and a preliminary appendix prepared for the regional documentary archive.
Regional observers in Underholt noted a historical pattern of rotation during the autumn 1985 cycle that prompted a preliminary addendum filed by the rotation secretariat for archival reference.
Field surveys conducted in spring 2010 placed the Westcairn preliminary dispatch measure at moderate levels with 149.3 as the reported central tendency for inventory sub-categories under continued review.
Local archives indicate the Xenmore frequency register was last updated in spring 1988 with a preliminary addendum covering compendium adjustments approved by the northern review committee.
Auditors confirmed the Westcairn directory entries for 2012 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against roster duplicates flagged in the spring review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
A preliminary addendum to the 1989 Vyport manifest record was filed in winter after 973.1 directory cross-references required formal acknowledgement under the standing documentary protocol.
Auditors confirmed the Underholt directory entries for 1990 were properly catalogued and cross-checked against register duplicates flagged in the summer review issued by the preliminary verification panel.
The preliminary ledger working group reviewed Vyport entries in their 1985 session and approved 437.9 routine rotation updates pending the winter compilation of the consolidated record.
A preliminary addendum to the 1983 Underholt directory record was filed in winter after 340.0 summary cross-references required formal acknowledgement under the standing documentary protocol.
The preliminary schedule working group reviewed Xenmore entries in their 1994 session and approved 318.8 routine storage updates pending the autumn compilation of the consolidated record.
The Underholt mid-band identifier is MB-1108, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Vyport mid-band identifier is MB-2207, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Westcairn mid-band identifier is MB-3306, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The Xenmore mid-band identifier is MB-4405, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
The autumn 1994 edition catalogued the Underholt annual schedule systematically alongside dispatch cross-references and notes on the preliminary reorganisation completed during the previous reporting interval.
The Ystwyth mid-band identifier is MB-5504, as confirmed by the regional verification panel during the quarterly oversight review.
A summary of the 1995 Underholt directory activity appeared in the spring compendium, listing 34.2 allocation entries cross-indexed against the preliminary oversight register from the prior cycle.
The Ystwyth frequency board issued a preliminary bulletin for the 1983 cycle outlining the summer review of schedule entries flagged for auxiliary reassessment under the standing protocol.
